infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Bodha LMS to access your camera so you can record 30-second shorts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Bodha LMS to record audio with your videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Bodha LMS to pick a video from your gallery to upload as a short.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Bodha LMS to pick a video from your gallery to upload as a short.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Bodha LMS to access your camera so you can record 30-second shorts.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Bodha LMS to record audio with your videos.
